scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm extension:check && pnpm build && pnpm test
scripts.extension:check: node --check ChromeExtension/background.js && node --check ChromeExtension/content.js && node --check ChromeExtension/url-utils.js && node ChromeExtension/url-utils.test.js && node -e 'JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("ChromeExtension/manifest.json", "utf8"))'
